metadata.description: Tags to apply to all resources
Globally unique ACR name (max 50 chars, alphanumeric)
Key Vault name for storing ACR credentials
Key Vault name for storing connection string
Database tier: Basic ($5/mo), S0 ($15/mo), or GP_S_Gen5_1 (serverless, auto-pauses)

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('{0}-sql-{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment')), format('{0}-db-{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment')))]
[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('keyVaultName'), 'database-url')]

properties.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=True;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', format('{0}-sql-{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'))), '2024-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, format('{0}-db-{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment')), parameters('adminUsername'), parameters('adminPassword'))]

dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', format('{0}-sql-{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment')), format('{0}-db-{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment')))]

metadata.description: Key Vault name for storing connection string
Redis SKU: Basic (cheapest, no SLA), Standard, Premium

properties.value: [format('rediss://:{0}@{1}:6380', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Cache/redis', format('{0}-redis-{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'))), '2024-11-01').primaryKey, reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Cache/redis', format('{0}-redis-{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'))), '2024-11-01').hostName)]

metadata.description: Key Vault name for storing connection string
Storage SKU: Standard_LRS, Standard_GRS, Standard_ZRS, Premium_LRS

properties.value: [format('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName={0};AccountKey={1};EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net', format('{0}stg{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment')), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', format('{0}stg{1}', parameters('projectName'), parameters('environment'))), '2023-05-01').keys[0].value)]

metadata.description: SQL connection string Key Vault secret URI
Redis connection string Key Vault secret URI
Blob Storage connection string Key Vault secret URI
Scale-to-zero: min replicas for user-facing apps (0 = scales to zero when idle)
